problem id: f2b23d11
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND SHL(5)

examples:
  10111010 -> 01000000
  10010101 -> 10100000
  01011000 -> 00000000
  11000111 -> 00100000
  10001110 -> 01000000
  11110000 -> 00000000
  01100101 -> 00100000
  00011011 -> 01000000

query: 01111100
predicted answer: 10000000
